title: Erdős–Gyárfás Conjecture
next_action: Attack spread-doubling (L025/G013) at its bottom rungs: prove that no power-free pinched gadget exists with s_min in {1,2} — the s_min=2 case is sharply structured (C4-freeness forces a unique common neighbor of the terminals) — using the ear/rerouting machinery L012-L013 and the E010 profile samples; or exhibit such a gadget, which disproves statement 0.1 via the L025 ring assembly. Deferred alternative: extend the E010 atom census to order 16 (multi-part PyPy, E006/S009 pattern). Pivot triggers: an atom found (disproof protocol: assemble ring, verify, fresh reproduction audit); bottom-rung proof revealing the general mechanism; prior ring/gadget literature surfacing.
